calendar.matters:
ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Feb-22-2012 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Compelling Personal Representative To Act Concerning Estate; Request For Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Feb-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barry Schneider for and with Larry Bartholomew. James Swick appeared by telephone for Tim Matheson.

Counsel addressed the remaining issues with regard to the missing dividend statements, the accountants fees, the Attorney's fees, etc. The Petition for Order Compelling Personal Representative to Act Concerning Estate, etc. was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Andrade.

Petition For Order Compelling Personal Representative To Act Concerning Estate; Request For Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Dec-21-2011 Continued To Feb-22-12 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barry Schneider, Esq. for and with Executor Larry Bartholomew; Jim Swick, Esq. via telephone call for Beneficiary Tim Matheson.

The Court inquired as to the status on the transfer of securities, change of name on the bank account, tax return costs and fees.
Mr. Swick reported that he had received the statements by email & fax, but still missing the dividends & re-investment statement for Oct. & Dec. 2010. Mr. Schneider stated that he will try to call EXCEL to get the statement for Mr. Swick, the transfer of securities had been completed and will update the specific distribution statements & accounting with in 60 days, since the accountant is in the Far-East. After hearing from counsel, the court taken off calendar issues on bank account, transfer of securities, the missing check #268 for $4,000.00 check has been produced, request for issuance of paper check and direct deposit was denied and not order by the court. Matter is continued to 02-22-12 at 10:30 a.m. for status on remaining issues on court costs, costs for tax return & objection to fees.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-21-2011 Continued To Feb-22-12 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-06-2011 Continued To Dec-21-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-01-2011 Continued To Dec-06-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-20-2011 Continued To Nov-01-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barry Schneider for and with Larry Bartholomew. James Swick appeared by telephone for Tim Matheson.

Status on transfer of the securities was continued to November 1, 2011 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for one final time for resolution of the final issues and then the matter is going off calendar. If someone wants to file a petition to compel something, they can do so. Counsel is to communicate before that date. Mr. Swick will appear by telephone.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-28-2011 Continued To Sep-20-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Swick appeared by telephone for Tim Matheson. Barry Schneider for and with Larry Bartholomew.

Mr. Scheider is to provide stock statements, information on the blocked account and reconciliation of the reserve to Mr. Swick within 45-days. The matter was continued to September 20, 2011 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for closing of all matters. Mr. Swick will appear by courtcall.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-31-2011 Continued To Jun-28-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Swick appeared by telephone for Tim Mattheson. Carrie Schneider (Certified Law Student) made a special appearance for Attorney Barry Schneider for Larry Bartholomew.

Kerry Schneider requested a continuance stating that Barry Schneider was ill. Mr. Swick stated that the stocks had not been transferred. The matter was continued to June 28, 2011 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court asked Kerry to inform Barry that transfer of the stocks needs to be accopmlished and to execute his best efforts.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-04-2011 Continued To May-31-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-13-2011 Continued To May-04-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-18-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barry Schneider for and with Larry Bartholomew. James Swick appeared by telephone for Tim Matheson.

Mr. Schneider presented a stipulation regarding settlement of Beneficiary objections which has been signed by all Parties and an order approving final distribution. Mr. Swick stated that he reviewed the order, that he made some revisions and that it has been approved by them. The Court granted the accounting petition (subject to review the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-07-2010 Continued To Jan-18-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

second amended petition and final distribution

Continued to Jan. 18, 2010 at 10:30 am. for a stipulated settlement agreement and request for an approval of second accounting.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-09-2010 Continued To Dec-07-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barry Schneider for and with Larry Bartholomew. James Swick appeared by telephone for Timothy Matheson (Beneficiary).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to whether the Jefferson National Life Insurance annuity should be treated as a stock or as an annuity. Discussions regarding mediation were held. The matter was continued to December 7, 2010 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the Parties to communicate and narrow down issues, and for setting. Mr. Swick will appear by telephone.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
